channel.title: Control on Zero Note: Self-destructing shareable notes
channel.description: Recent content in Control on Zero Note: Self-destructing shareable notes

item.title: How to Send a Self-Destructing Message That Actually Disappears
item.description: A better way to send message note that disappears after being read without relying on chat apps

item.title: How to Share a Note Securely (Without Leaving a Trace)
item.description: A simpler way to share sensitive information without leaving it sitting in chat history or email forever.
